LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT EDWARD OLSHANETSKY'S MOTION TO DISMISS - PER THE DECLARATION OF DARREN DARWISH, RESPONDENT EDWARD OSHANETSKY'S MOTION TO DISMISS IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 24, 2017 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS MUST BE FILED IN ACCORDANCE WITH CCP 1005. COUNSEL FOR MR. OSHANETSKY IS REMINDED THAT THE LOCAL RULES REQUIRE THAT COURTESY COPIES OF ALL FILED PAPERS BE DELIVERED TO DEPARTMENT 302. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER SUKHOVITSKY, MIKHAIL SUKHOVITSKY, NONNA AS TO RESPONDENT OLSHANETSKY, EDWARD BUSINESS INVESTMENT MANAGEMENT, INC. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-21-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
REPLY IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO DISMISS (TRANSACTION ID # 17229040) FILED BY RESPONDENT OLSHANETSKY, EDWARD

LAW AND MOTION. DEPT. 302, AS TO RESPONDENT EDWARD OLSHANETSKY'S MOTION TO DISMISS HIMSELF AS A RESPONDENT TO MIKHAIL AND NONNA SUKHOVITSKY'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. GRANTED. MR. OLSHANETSKY'S MOTION TO DISMISS IS PROPER UNDER CCP SEC. 1285.2, AS HE WAS NOT A PARTY TO THE ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS AND THE WRITTEN ARBITRATION AWARD DOES NOT INDICATE ANY FINDINGS OF ALTER-EGO LIABILITY OR PIERCING OF THE CORPORATE VEIL. IN LIGHT OF PETITIONERS' REQUEST TO KEEP MR. OLSHANETSKY AS A PARTY IN THE ACTION SOLELY FOR PURPOSES OF EFFECTUATING POST-JUDGMENT REMEDIES, THE PROPER PROCEDURE APPEARS TO BE THE FILING OF A MOTION TO AMEND THE JUDGMENT. (SEE GREENSPAN V. LADT, LLC (2010) 191 CAL.APP.4TH 486.) (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S NOTES) PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: CHARLENE P. KIESSELBACH, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: GORDON AIAVAO, CSR #11216, GAIAVAO@SFTC.ORG (302/CPK)
